title: Stylish.
content:
There once was an old crocodile
        Who lived on the banks of the Nile.
     One day, for a meal,
        He swallowed a wheel,
     And ate for dessert, an automobile.
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Stylish."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
